---
name: scrape-softuni-courses
---

Generate a CSV file containing information about all the courses in SoftUni (https://softuni.bg/trainings/opencourses). I need course name, description, and duration (in weeks). The generated CSV file must be extensive as it will be used as a dataset.

There may be multiple instances of the same course in different time periods. In such cases, include only the most recent instance of the course in the CSV file. The course name should be unique and not include the time period.
